_comment: Word fillers/phrases counted from normal transcription. Multi-word phrases are matched as sequences. Edit here or via the in-app gear (settings) button. Longer phrases are matched before shorter ones automatically.
_comment_acoustic: Filled pauses (um/uh) are caught by a separate grammar-constrained acoustic pass, because normal transcription autocorrects them into real words. Each entry must be a single word the model knows. Adding more (e.g. 'hmm') increases false-positive risk.
_comment_echo_cancel: macOS voice-processing echo cancellation: what your Mac plays through its speakers (other people on the call) is subtracted before counting, so you can skip headphones. Only active with the default mic (mic_device null). Set false to use plain capture.
_comment_mic: null = system default input. Pick a device in the in-app settings, or run `./run.sh --list-devices`.

monologue._comment: Airtime guard: warn when you've been talking continuously too long. mode: off | short | medium. A 2s silence gap resets the clock; turns under 3s don't count in stats.

session._comment: Sessions auto-end (save to history + start fresh) after this many minutes of silence. 0 disables auto-end.

graph._comment: Timeline graph: fillers per interval, bars compress so the whole call stays visible.
